chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 1196 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.01.2016 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi Habibullah petitioner present in person Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Addl.A.G. a/w SIP Umaid Ali Lakho Acting SHO Kotri The petitioner is present in person, states that he has got the FIR bearing Crime No. 177 of 2014 registered against the private respondents Kashmir Khan that after due investigation has been challaned and presently the matter is pending before Additional Sessions Judge, Kotri for trial. He states that respondent No.4 is causing harassment to him and is trying to reinvestigate the matter illegally. Comments have been filed by learned A.A.G. In the comments the allegations of petitioner have been denied. SIP Umaid Ali Lakho, Acting SHO PS Kotri is present and states that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner in future and the police would act strictly in accordance with law. The petitioner is satisfied with this statement and does not press this petition which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE
